oauth2-example-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to ensure the project compiles and runs on JDK 21.
oauth2-example-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure or runtime incompatibility if the project is built with JDK 21 but configured for JDK 17.

oauth2-example-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to provide XML binding capabilities removed from the JDK module system.
oauth2-example-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime if code uses javax.xml.bind classes which are no longer in the JDK.
